title: cola marsupium var. laurentii
intro: Cola marsupium var. laurentii, also known as Kola nut, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Sterculiaceae. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to stimulate the nervous system and increase alertness, due to its high caffeine content. The health benefits of Cola marsupium var. laurentii include its use as a natural stimulant, as well as its potential to improve cognitive function and boost energy levels. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as tea and infusions, to promote mental clarity and reduce fatigue.
